managelidar 0.1.5
  • Reference
    • How to use the functions

Build a combined VPC (Virtual Point Cloud) FeatureCollection from every item in a collection's items directory

Source: R/stac_helpers.R
build_combined_vpc.Rd

vpc_to_stac_items() builds each item by taking a VPC feature and adding STAC-specific fields on top (links, collection). This reverses that: strips those two fields back off, leaving the original VPC feature shape (type/stac_version/stac_extensions/id/ geometry/bbox/properties/assets) - so the result is a valid VPC representing every item currently in the collection.

Usage

build_combined_vpc(items_dir)

Arguments

items_dir

Path to items directory

Value

A list representing a VPC FeatureCollection

On this page
